name: PSEUDOXANTHOMA ELASTICUM
definition: recessive hereditary systemic disorder characterized by degeneration of elastic tissue

demographics.Histo: tissue degeneration of internal elastic lamina + medial thickening

dominant_finding: large amorphous calcific deposits in soft tissue about joints
discriminating_features: large amorphous calcific deposits in soft tissue about joints
lobulated appearance of arteries (similar to fibromuscular hyperplasia)

Skin: large amorphous calcific deposits in soft tissue about joints
Eyes: lobulated appearance of arteries (similar to fibromuscular hyperplasia)
